You must exchange this code for a business token using a server-to-server call.</div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">If you are a Tech Provider, you will use business tokens exclusively.</div><div class="x1motxo8 x1dg8jwx x3a6nna xm5vtmc x1t2x7uc x1o1n6r0 x1366vqa x1c773n9 x1k03ns3 xpbi8i2 x9820fh xml9wff xhj0du5 xrm2kyc xjprkx4 xlu1awn x12429cg x6tc29j xbq7h4v x6jdkww xq9mrsl x14vqqas xod5an3">If you are a Solution Partner, you will use your <a class="x1i10hfl xjbqb8w xjqpnuy xc5r6h4 xqeqjp1 x1phubyo x13fuv20 x18b5jzi x1q0q8m5 x1t7ytsu x972fbf x10w94by x1qhh985 x14e42zd x9f619 x1ypdohk xdl72j9 xdt5ytf x2lah0s x3ct3a4 xdj266r x14z9mp xat24cr x1lziwak x2lwn1j xeuugli xexx8yu xyri2b x18d9i69 x1c1uobl x16tdsg8 xggy1nq x1ja2u2z x1t137rt x1bvjpef xt0b8zv xmnv3 x7s97pk x9v5kkp xzv1bek xawggmj x1uhb9sk xt0psk2 x6s0dn4" href="/documentation/business-messaging/whatsapp/access-tokens#system-user-access-tokens" role="link" tabindex="0">system user access token</a> (“system token”) to share your credit line with onboarded business customers, and business tokens for everything else. Note that the system user who the token represents must have granted your app the <strong>business_management</strong> permission, and must have been granted an <strong>Admin</strong> or
